reforms.description: The Polish government created special economic zones (SEZ) to attract investment by offering generous tax holidays and other incentives to businesses, and introduced start-up loans from the Labour Fund to support unemployed individuals in establishing their own businesses, offering concessional interest rates and potential grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to stimulate entrepreneurship and investment, which can lead to job creation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Both initiatives have been put into practice and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of SEZs and startup loans represents significant but not structural changes to the support for startups.
reforms.source_quote: Another type of programme launched by the State to foster restructuring and private sector development against adverse local odds has been the creation of special economic zones (SEZ) granting investors generous tax holidays and other advantages.

reforms.description: The Polish government initiated a restructuring programme for the steel sector, which includes financial assistance and protection against import competition to support recovery, alongside measures to streamline the taxation of individual entrepreneurs and the establishment of a central register of liens on movable property to facilitate access to credit for small enterprises. Additionally, a de-bureaucratisation drive was launched to achieve greater regulatory transparency and coherence.
reforms.component_name: Steel Sector Restructuring and Taxation Measures
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms aim to enhance the business environment and support recovery in key sectors, which can lead to improved economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The restructuring programme and regulatory measures have been enacted and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The combination of restructuring and regulatory measures represents significant changes to the support framework for businesses.
reforms.source_quote: In 1994, the taxation of individual entrepreneurs was streamlined as they were offered the option of a lump sum tax on certain types of incomes and a low, flat rate for others.

reforms.description: Poland is focusing on enhancing the links between basic and applied research as well as between research and industry to facilitate the creation and diffusion of technological know-how.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening the connections between research and industry is expected to foster innovation and improve the commercialization of research outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been publicly stated but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve collaboration between research institutions and industry.
reforms.source_quote: The links between basic and applied research as well as between research and industry need to be enhanced.
